title: Does store music influence shoppers without them noticing? — Daniel Fox
meta_description: In the famous wine study, 86 percent of shoppers swore the music didn't affect them, and the sales data said otherwise. How music shapes behavior below conscious awareness — priming, emotion, and time perception.

schema.headline: Does store music influence shoppers without them noticing?
schema.description: How music shapes shopper behavior below conscious awareness, through priming, emotion, and time perception.
